visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long black hair, dressed in a black and white striped crop top and light pink sweatpants, stands in a brightly lit indoor living room. She smiles warmly at the camera while holding a plastic-wrapped package of fresh green okra. (2) In a close-up shot, she places a spoonful of salt into a gold-toned pot of vigorously boiling water on a gas range. She then carefully drops the green okra pods into the bubbling water using metal tongs. (3) The scene shifts to a kitchen sink where the woman holds a metal strainer filled with boiled okra under a stream of cold running water. She then moves to a white countertop to trim the stems and slice the pods into bite-sized circular pieces. (4) She transfers the chopped okra into a tall, clear glass jar. She then adds several slices of hard-boiled eggs from a white plate and sprinkles seasonings and sauces, including a black packet of spicy tuna, into the container. (5) The woman tightly secures the white lid of the jar and shakes it vertically and horizontally with high energy. The contents are visibly tossed and coated in a reddish-orange spicy sauce as she moves the jar in front of her. (6) She opens the jar and uses a long spoon to scoop out a portion of the spicy salad, taking a large bite. Her facial expressions convey intense satisfaction as she chews, later using seaweed sheets to wrap more of the food and continuing to eat enthusiastically.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: 🇰🇷韓國人DIY 爆辣秋葵沙拉. [Subtitle]: 今天一起起床. (2) [Subtitle]: 超級想吃一個東西. (3) [Subtitle]: 就是秋葵. [Variety]: DIY爆辣版本. (4) [Subtitle]: 我要做個爆辣沙拉版本. (5) [Subtitle]: 這個是從韓國帶來的. [Slogan]: 火辣美乃滋鮪魚. (6) [Subtitle]: 先在滾燙的熱水中放入一些鹽. (7) [Subtitle]: 放入秋葵, 燙大約1分鐘. (8) [Subtitle]: 把余燙好的食材放進冷水裡降溫. (9) [Subtitle]: 把秋葵的蒂頭去掉. (10) [Subtitle]: 再切成好入口的大小. (11) [Subtitle]: 我把它裝進玻璃容器裡. [Slogan]: + 水蒸蛋. (12) [Slogan]: + 韓國胡椒. (13) [Slogan]: + 寡醣糖漿. (14) [Slogan]: + 火辣美乃滋鮪魚. (15) [Slogan]: + 芝麻油. (16) [Variety]: 搖 搖. (17) [Subtitle]: 看起來很讚 🥰. (18) [Variety]: (好吃到極樂). (19) [Subtitle]: 秋葵的口感真的太誇張了吧. (20) [Subtitle]: 還有美乃滋的綿滑感. (21) [Subtitle]: 水煮蛋也非常鬆軟, 跟料理超搭. (22) [Subtitle]: 就算是不敢吃秋葵的人. [Subtitle]: 也會愛上這道菜 😂. (23) [Slogan]: (+ 辣醬). (24) [Subtitle]: 這個不吃真的虧大了!. (25) [Subtitle]: 秋葵控快存起來 🔥.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator presenting the DIY tutorial.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A woman with long black hair wearing a black and white horizontal striped crop top and pink sweatpants.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A modern apartment interior featuring a kitchen with a gas stove and white cabinets, and a living area with minimalist furniture and neutral walls.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy female speech begins with a high pitch and fast delivery. An upbeat, rhythmic electronic pop BGM with a steady kick drum beat plays in the background. The vocal tone is extremely friendly and animated, setting a cheerful mood. (2) The sound of water boiling rapidly in a metal pot creates a bubbling ambient texture. A distinct clinking sound of a metal tongs hitting the pot is heard, followed by the soft splash of okra pods entering the water. (3) Continuous running water sound dominates as okra is rinsed. Rapid, rhythmic percussive thuds occur as a knife chops the vegetables on a wooden surface. The narrator’s voice remains enthusiastic, describing the steps over the steady musical beat. (4) Auditory focus shifts to the rustling of plastic packaging being torn open. This is followed by the metallic clinking of a spoon scraping the inside of a glass jar and the wet, viscous sound of sauces being poured into the mix. (5) A sequence of loud, rhythmic shaking sounds occurs as ingredients hit the glass walls of the jar repeatedly. The BGM maintains its tempo, while the narrator makes excited vocalizations in response to the visual change in the food. (6) Prominent chewing and swallowing sounds are heard as the woman eats. She makes soft, high-pitched vocalizations of pleasure and excitement between descriptive sentences. The audio mix remains clear with the BGM sitting just below the vocal level.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Introduction -> Preparation -> Cooking -> Assembly -> Tasting -> Review
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide an engaging DIY recipe for a spicy okra salad using specific Korean ingredients while demonstrating the delicious results through an enthusiastic food tasting and review.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator prominently features and uses a specific branded product (Buldak Mayo Tuna) as a key ingredient for the recipe.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses fast-paced editing and expressive facial reactions to maintain high viewer engagement. The combination of cooking tutorial and ASMR-style eating sounds targets both foodies and short-form content consumers.
